overview.description: The BondBloxx Bloomberg Six Month Target Duration US Treasury ETF (XHLF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is passively managed to invest in a portfolio of US Treasury securities with a target duration of six months. XHLF was launched on Sep 13, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Treasury 6 Month Target Duration Index
